name: LUDO CRUISE
description: Developed a digital board game, focusing on engaging gameplay and multiplayer functionality. This project involved complex game state management and real-time multiplayer synchronization, optimizing for a smooth user experience across various devices.
tagline: Engaging Digital Board Game for Multiplayer Fun!
myRole: As the Lead Game Developer, I was responsible for the core game logic, network integration, and UI implementation. I managed a small team of junior developers, ensuring timely delivery and adherence to design specifications. Optimized game performance and implemented analytics tracking.

name: LUMBER TYCOON INC
description: Created an idle simulation game involving resource management and strategic growth. Focused on scalable economy systems and intuitive progression mechanics, allowing players to build and expand their lumber empire.
tagline: Build Your Lumber Empire: A Strategic Idle Simulation!
myRole: My role involved designing and implementing the core idle mechanics, including resource generation, upgrade systems, and player progression. I focused on creating an addictive loop and ensuring long-term player engagement through carefully balanced economics.

name: CRAZY TAXI 2 – ANGRY DRIVER
description: Worked on an open-world taxi driving game with dynamic environments and challenging missions. Focused on realistic vehicle physics and AI for pedestrians and other vehicles, delivering a chaotic and fun driving experience.
tagline: Chaotic Open-World Taxi Driving with Dynamic Missions!
myRole: I contributed to the vehicle physics system, AI behavior for traffic and pedestrians, and the mission scripting framework. I also optimized environment streaming for seamless transitions in the large open-world map.

name: SNIPER FURY
description: Contributed to an FPS sniper shooting game, emphasizing realistic mechanics and intense action. Developed features for bullet ballistics, enemy AI, and a robust weapon upgrade system for an authentic sniper experience.
tagline: Precision & Action: Realistic FPS Sniper Gameplay!
myRole: My primary responsibility was implementing realistic bullet physics, wind simulation, and hit detection for the sniper mechanics. I also developed parts of the enemy AI and integrated weapon customization features.

name: MODERN WARFARE SHOOTER
description: Involved in the development of a modern warfare FPS game with diverse combat scenarios. Focused on creating engaging level designs, dynamic cover systems, and balanced weapon loadouts for competitive multiplayer and single-player modes.
tagline: Intense Modern Warfare: Diverse Combat Scenarios!
myRole: I worked on various combat systems, including weapon handling, player movement, and implementing environmental interactions. I also contributed to optimizing game assets for performance on target platforms and integrated new features based on player feedback.

name: ALISHA ACADEMY KIDS LEARNING
description: Developed an educational game for kids, focusing on interactive learning and engaging content. The project aimed to make learning fun through mini-games and colorful, intuitive interfaces, covering subjects like math and language.
tagline: Fun & Interactive Learning for Kids: Alisha Academy!
myRole: My role was focused on implementing interactive mini-games and educational modules. I worked closely with educators and UI/UX designers to create age-appropriate content and ensure the game was engaging and effective for young learners.

name: UNDERGROUND RACING
description: Experience the thrill of underground street racing with high-speed cars and challenging drift mechanics. Customize your ride and dominate the city streets.
tagline: High-Speed Racing & Drifting: Dominate the Streets!
myRole: Implemented vehicle physics and handling models, ensuring realistic drifting and racing mechanics. Developed the multiplayer synchronization for competitive online play and designed several challenging race tracks.

name: ZOMBIE SHOOTER 3D
description: Survive waves of zombies in an intense 3D first-person shooter. Utilize a variety of weapons and tactics to stay alive and uncover the truth behind the apocalypse.
tagline: Intense Zombie Apocalypse: Survive the Hordes!
myRole: Developed the zombie AI behavior, including pathfinding and attack patterns. Designed and implemented weapon systems and visual effects for gore and explosions, enhancing the immersive survival horror experience.

name: BUS SIMULATOR
description: Become a professional bus driver in a realistic city environment. Master different routes, manage your schedule, and transport passengers safely across various urban landscapes.
tagline: Realistic Bus Driving Simulation: Master the City Routes!
myRole: Implemented detailed bus physics and handling, traffic AI systems, and dynamic weather effects. Designed various city routes and optimized the urban environment for smooth performance and realistic visuals.

name: FLAG MASTER
description: Test your knowledge of world flags in this engaging quiz and trivia game. Learn about countries, capitals, and their national symbols through challenging levels.
tagline: Global Knowledge Challenge: Become a Flag Master!
myRole: Developed the core quiz mechanics, including question generation, answer validation, and scoring systems. Designed an intuitive user interface for a seamless and educational gameplay experience across multiple languages.

name: FLYWORLD – 2D FLIGHT
description: Experience the classic feel of a 2D flight simulator. Navigate through challenging aerial courses, collect power-ups, and compete for high scores in a retro-inspired world.
tagline: Classic 2D Flight Action: Soar Through the Skies!
myRole: Implemented the 2D flight physics and control system, focusing on a responsive and enjoyable user experience. Designed various level layouts using procedural generation techniques and developed engaging power-ups and enemy AI.

name: TASBEHAT TILE MATCH
description: A unique Islamic-themed tile match puzzle game combining cultural elements with classic match-3 gameplay. Relax and learn through visually pleasing puzzles and spiritual verses.
tagline: Islamic Tile Match: A Relaxing & Engaging Puzzle!
myRole: Developed the core tile-matching mechanics and puzzle generation algorithms. Created an intuitive and aesthetically pleasing user interface that integrated Islamic cultural motifs and provided a serene gameplay experience.

name: Alpha Battle
description: Manage your gladiators, train them for battle, and lead them to glory in the arena. A strategic management game combined with turn-based combat mechanics.
tagline: Gladiator Glory: Management Meets Arena Combat!
myRole: Designed and implemented the gladiator management systems, including training, equipment, and recruitment. Developed the turn-based combat system with AI opponents and balanced unit stats for strategic depth.

name: TRUCK SIMULATOR: OFFROAD 4×4
description: Conquer challenging off-road terrains with powerful 4x4 trucks. Navigate through mud, rocks, and rivers in a realistic simulation experience.
myRole: Implemented realistic off-road vehicle physics, including tire friction, suspension, and terrain interaction. Designed challenging maps with various obstacles and optimized the game for mobile devices, ensuring smooth performance in complex environments.

name: FRUIT BLAST SAGA
description: Blast colorful fruits in this addictive match-3 puzzle adventure. Solve challenging puzzles, overcome obstacles, and progress through hundreds of levels.
tagline: Sweet Puzzle Fun: Blast Fruits & Clear Levels!
myRole: Developed the core match-3 game logic, including matching detection, cascading effects, and special power-ups. Designed numerous levels with increasing difficulty and implemented a visually appealing and intuitive user interface.

name: RAINING ROCKETS
description: An action-packed arcade survival game where you dodge a barrage of falling rockets. Collect power-ups, upgrade your defenses, and see how long you can survive the explosive chaos.
tagline: Explosive Arcade Survival: Dodge the Raining Rockets!
myRole: Implemented the core gameplay loop, including rocket spawning, player movement, and collision detection. Developed various power-ups and enemy types, and designed a dynamic scoring system to encourage replayability and high scores.

name: Genius Gen: Kids AI Learning
description: An innovative AI learning app designed for kids, making education interactive and fun. Utilizes AI to adapt to learning styles and provides personalized content for various subjects.
tagline: AI-Powered Learning: Smart Fun for Genius Kids!
myRole: Integrated AI features to personalize learning paths and adapt content difficulty based on child's progress. Developed interactive exercises and educational mini-games, ensuring a rich and engaging learning experience.

name: TOP-DOWN RUNNER
description: A fast-paced top-down endless runner game. Navigate through procedurally generated levels, avoid obstacles, collect coins, and challenge your reflexes for the ultimate high score.
tagline: Endless Thrills: Navigate the Top-Down Runner!
myRole: Developed the core endless runner mechanics, including procedural level generation, player controls, and obstacle placement. Optimized game performance for smooth gameplay and implemented a dynamic difficulty scaling system.
